assertion_results.text: The response asks at least 3 specific clarifying questions about: which fields to search, what relevance ranking means, and what performance threshold is required
assertion_results.evidence: In response.md under '### Clarifying Questions' (lines 79-93), the response asks 6 specific questions. Question 1 (line 81): 'Which fields should be searchable?' covering package name, version, license, pURLs, partial/prefix matching. Question 2 (line 83): 'What does "relevant" mean for search result ranking?' covering ordering, SQL ILIKE vs full-text search, relevance scoring. Question 3 (line 85): 'What is the performance threshold?' covering maximum response time, dataset size, database indexing. All three required topics are covered with specific technical detail.
